caption:
Things to do in Dubai this Eid? Here’s a list!

⭐️ See the dazzling atrium of Mall of the Emirates!

🎆 EID CELEBRATION FIREWORKS 
April 22, 9 PM: BlueWaters and The Beach, JBR
April 22, 7 and 9 PM: Dubai Parks and Resorts

🏖️ ETISALAT BY E& BEACH CANTEEN
April 21 to May 7, 4 PM to 11 PM

🎡 EID WONDERS AT GLOBAL VILLAGE
Until April 29, Sunday-Wednesday 4 PM - 12 AM, Thursday-Saturday 4 PM - 1 AM

🎶 EID Concerts & Plays in various locations 

Tag your family and friends! Eid Mubarak!
